title: LAURA GELLER NEW YORK Baked Balance-N-Brighten Color Correcting Foundation, Sand + Kabuki Brush
features: BALANCE-N-BRIGHTEN COLOR CORRECTING CC POWDER FOUNDATION + RETRACTABLE KABUKI BRUSH DUO: A light-medium coverage powder foundation that contain color correcting pigments for Weightless, Creamy Coverage that Self-Adjusts to leave skin looking Even, Flawless and Beautifully radiant.
description: Product description Our buildable foundation offers light to medium coverage for a natural, never cakey look that feels natural and weightless with a demi-matte finish. Use all over your face for an even and healthy glow. Ingredients MICA, TALC, NYLON-12, DIMETHICONE, ISOPROPYL PALMITATE, POLYSORBATE 20, MAGNESIUM ALUMINUM SILICATE, TOCOPHEROL, CENTELLA ASIATICA EXTRACT, CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF EXTRACT, SIMMONDSIA CHINENSIS SEED OIL / SIMMONDSIA CHINENSIS (JOJOBA) SEED OIL, ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, RETINYL PALMITATE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL DICAPRYLATE/DICAPRATE, LAUROYL LYSINE, SODIUM DEHYDROACETATE, PHENOXYETHANOL, BHT, TIN OXIDE, TITANIUM DIOXIDE (CI 77891), IRON OXIDES (CI77491, Ci77492, CI77499), CHROMIUM OXIDE GREEN (CI 77288), MANGANESE VIOLET (CI 77742) Directions Twist or dip the brush into powder and gently tap into any excess. Apply to skin using circular and sweeping motions. Safety Warning Store at room temp See more
